title: Ice and Fire: Dragon Finder
description: Easy way to find dragon from the mod Ice and Fire: Dragons and no longer have to expend hours or days exploring the world without being able to find any dragon
body:
Welcome to **Dragon Finder** mod.

This mod add a new item **Eye of Dragon** that works similar to Eye of Ender. Once it is used the eye will guide you to the **nearest dragon stage 4/5 in a radius of 500 blocks**.

Player now have an easy way to find dragon from the mod Ice and Fire: Dragons and no longer have to expend hours or days exploring the world without being able to find any dragon.
